name: CFSC Checks Cashed 27th & Oklahoma
description_short: CFSC Checks Cashed 27th & Oklahoma is a Milwaukee-based financial services center offering check cashing without bank account requirements, plus money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid debit cards.
description_long:
CFSC (Community Financial Services) operates as a neighborhood financial services hub in Milwaukee, with the 27th & Oklahoma location serving the local community at 3256 S 27th St. The company specializes in providing alternative financial services to unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to cash and financial tools without traditional banking relationships. The 27th & Oklahoma branch is one of several CFSC locations across Milwaukee, each offering consistent core services with some variation by location. CFSC has established partnerships with major money transfer networks (Western Union) and prepaid card providers (Yes! Debit Card, Boost Mobile) to expand service offerings. The company positions itself as a one-stop financial errand center for Milwaukee residents who need convenience and speed over traditional banking channels.

The 27th & Oklahoma location provides check cashing without requiring a bank account—customers only need a government-issued photo ID and personal information to cash checks immediately without waiting for funds to clear. Beyond check cashing, the location offers money transfers (domestic and international), electronic bill pay, money orders, prepaid debit cards with no credit check required, ATM access, installment loans, foreign currency exchange (80+ currencies), transit/MetroCard purchases, and phone resale services via EcoATM kiosk. The website emphasizes that no bank account or credit check is needed for core services like check cashing and prepaid debit cards. Business check cashing and tax refund services are also available. Operating hours are Monday-Friday 9 am–7 pm and Saturday 9 am–4 pm (closed Sundays).

CFSC distinguishes itself through immediate cash access without bank account requirements, multi-service convenience in a single location, and acceptance of diverse forms of government-issued photo ID (driver's license, passport, state ID, student/work ID). The company's foreign currency exchange service (80+ countries) and international money transfer capability serve Milwaukee's immigrant and international communities. The prepaid debit card offering with no credit check appeals to those with poor or no credit history. Unlike traditional banks, CFSC operates with faster processing and no monthly account maintenance fees for check cashing transactions.

However, check-cashing services inherently carry higher fees than traditional bank accounts, though specific fee amounts are not disclosed on the website. The location has limited weekend hours (Saturday only, closed Sundays), which may inconvenience some consumers. Installment loans are mentioned but not detailed—terms, rates, and eligibility criteria are absent from available content. The company's reliance on prepaid cards and fee-based transactions means ongoing costs for consumers compared to free banking alternatives. Service availability varies by location, and customers are advised to call ahead to verify specific services, suggesting inconsistency across branches.
pros: Check cashing available without bank account requirement—only photo ID and personal information needed
Immediate cash access with no waiting period for check funds to clear
Prepaid debit card (Yes! Debit Account) with no credit check required
Foreign currency exchange for 80+ countries, serving international communities
Money transfer services available domestically and internationally (Western Union partner)
Extended weekday hours (until 7 pm Monday-Friday) for working-age consumers
One-stop service location combining check cashing, bill pay, money orders, and ATM access
cons: Check cashing fees not disclosed on website—likely higher than bank alternatives, making regular use expensive
Limited Saturday hours (9 am–4 pm) and no Sunday service, creating inconvenience for weekend-heavy schedules
Installment loan details absent—rates, terms, APR, and eligibility criteria not provided on website
Service availability varies by location; customers must call to verify specific services offered
Prepaid debit card requires ongoing fees for transactions, making it more costly than free bank accounts long-term
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked Milwaukee residents who need immediate check cashing without bank account setup
International communities and immigrants needing foreign currency exchange or international money transfers
Small business owners who need quick business check cashing without bank processing delays
Consumers with poor credit history seeking prepaid debit cards with no credit checks
diagnosis: CFSC 27th & Oklahoma is best suited for unbanked consumers, immigrants needing international money services, and those unable or unwilling to open traditional bank accounts who prioritize convenience and speed over cost. The main caveat is that fee-based services (check cashing, prepaid cards, money transfers) are significantly more expensive than bank alternatives over time, making CFSC suitable for occasional use rather than primary financial management.
services: Domestic and international money transfers (Western Union)
Prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account, Boost Mobile)
meta_description: CFSC 27th & Oklahoma in Milwaukee offers check cashing without bank account requirements, plus money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid debit cards.
